growth_records.cite: Georgoulis et al. Genome-Wide Identification of Tomato Xylem Sap Fitness Factors for Three Plant-Pathogenic Ralstonia Species. mSystems (2021). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.01229-21. [PMC8562481]
growth_records.snippet: Rich medium cultures were grown to saturation (20 to 24 h; 5 or 6 cell doublings)...Ralstonia was routinely grown in CPG rich medium (per liter: 1 g Casamino Acids, 10 g Bacto peptone, 5 g glucose, 1 g yeast extract) at
growth_records.notes: Fitness-assay growth phase (strains GMI1000, PSI07, IBSBF1503 grown together under identical protocol) in CPG rich medium reported '20 to 24 h; 5 or 6 cell doublings' to reach saturation from OD600=0.02 seed. Calculated using midpoint values (22 h, 5.5 doublings): doubling_time_h = 22/5.5 = 4.0 h; growth_rate_per_h (mu) = ln2/4.0 = 0.1733 h-1. This is an average generation rate across the whole growth-to-saturation window (includes any lag), not a pure exponential-phase mu; full reported range implies doubling_time 3.33-4.8 h (mu 0.144-0.208 h-1). Paper does not distinguish doubling count by strain for CPG, so identical value applies to all three strains (see also PSI07 and IBSBF1503 records). [metadata completed from paper Methods: pH]

growth_records.cite: Georgoulis et al. Genome-Wide Identification of Tomato Xylem Sap Fitness Factors for Three Plant-Pathogenic Ralstonia Species. mSystems (2021). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.01229-21. [PMC8562481]
growth_records.snippet: minimal medium cultures were grown for over 48 h (5 or 6 cell doublings for strains PSI07 and GMI1000...). For minimal medium growth curves and fitness assays, strains were grown in quarter-strength M63 [per liter: 3.4 g
growth_records.notes: Minimal medium cultures grown 'for over 48 h' with 5 or 6 doublings for GMI1000/PSI07. Calculated using midpoint doublings (5.5) and the stated minimum time (48 h, since actual duration was >48h this is an upper-bound estimate of mu / lower-bound of doubling_time): doubling_time_h = 48/5.5 = 8.73 h; mu = ln2/8.73 = 0.0794 h-1. True mu is likely somewhat lower than this bound because actual incubation exceeded 48 h. Confidence lowered to 'low' due to open-ended time value.

growth_records.cite: Georgoulis et al. Genome-Wide Identification of Tomato Xylem Sap Fitness Factors for Three Plant-Pathogenic Ralstonia Species. mSystems (2021). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.01229-21. [PMC8562481]
growth_records.snippet: For xylem sap experiments, cells were resuspended in 20 ml of xylem sap at a starting cell density of 10^6 cells/ml (2 x 10^7 cells total) and grown for 25 h (7 or 8 doublings for GMI1000 and 8 or 9 doublings for PSI07).
growth_records.notes: GMI1000 in xylem sap: 7 or 8 doublings in 25 h. Midpoint doublings=7.5: doubling_time_h=25/7.5=3.33h; mu=ln2/3.33=0.2079 h-1. Xylem sap is a natural, undefined complex medium (composition not chemically detailed in paper beyond being tomato xylem sap from Moneymaker cultivar). [metadata completed from paper Methods: pH]
